personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer | Data Platform & Pipeline Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong AWS, Python, SQL, ETL/ELT, PySpark, and data platform background. Built and optimized large-scale telemetry and capacity data pipelines across regulated enterprise environments, including AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Oracle, PySpark, Parquet, and reporting layers. Experienced in data cleansing, standardization, forecasting-ready datasets, pipeline validation, performance optimization, and stakeholder-facing analytics delivery. Currently strengthening Databricks, Delta Lake, Terraform, Kafka/MSK, and lakehouse skills to align legacy and cloud data engineering experience with modern AWS data platforms.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable ingestion, cleansing, transformation, and reporting workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones for raw telemetry, AWS Glue for ETL processing, and Amazon Redshift for scalable forecasting and analytics workloads.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention structures to support seasonal analysis, executive reporting, data quality checks, and capacity forecasting use cases.
Developed ML-ready datasets and forecasting pipelines using Python, PySpark, Prophet, and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead with 90%+ accuracy.
Integrated disparate operational and monitoring data sources including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure feeds into unified reporting and analytics datasets.
Improved pipeline reliability through validation checks, reconciliation logic, structured operational reporting, and repeatable execution patterns for regulated banking environments.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS to support scalable, on-demand processing for capacity analytics and forecasting workloads.
Partnered with technical and business stakeholders to deliver clean, well-structured datasets, dashboards, and executive-level capacity insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, transforming operational telemetry into actionable performance and reliability insights.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security controls with no production monitoring regression during cutover.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile applications to improve visibility into customer-facing system behavior.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, telemetry coverage, and performance visibility requirements.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise monitoring solutions for utility systems using CA APM, CA CEM, and CA ADA across performance, visibility, and operational support workflows.
Worked in a utility technology environment with monitoring and integration exposure across business-critical systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services enterprise, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across distributed systems.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports with repeatable operational data workflows.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and technical documentation adopted as standards across client monitoring environments.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and performance teams to diagnose bottlenecks using transaction telemetry and infrastructure metrics.
Delivered training and technical documentation for internal teams and customers responsible for maintaining monitoring infrastructure and processes.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed high-volume J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, JDBC bottlenecks, thread contention, heap pressure, CPU constraints, and garbage collection issues.
Installed and configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to improve real-time visibility during load tests.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while supporting transaction volumes described as 10x VISA scale.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built a C++/OCCI/OCI validation framework to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation pipelines to support phased migration, reconciliation, and cutover integrity.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE mainframe modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML messaging interfaces, and DB2-backed VC++ modules in a government modernization environment.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing workloads.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing processes by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS Flexible Bill Formatter, EDI interfaces, and Enabler/CSM/EMS modules across invoicing, settlement, and reporting workflows.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration with Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and operations effort.
Operated across HPUX, SunOS, and Linux environments while maintaining code in CVS and ClearCase across long-running enterprise delivery cycles.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent capability, optimized ETL and data access, and addressed small-file challenges with Parquet and Snappy compression for analytics-ready data lake workflows.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90%, produced ML-ready telemetry datasets, and predicted capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead for enterprise infrastructure planning.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic pipeline using Python, Grok/xAI API, FAISS, sentence-transformers, and document rendering workflows. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, tailoring, resume and cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking.
